top_signals.title: Senate eyes Hegseth travel cuts without probes into Iran school bombing, boat strikes
top_signals.summary: Senate lawmakers added a provision in the NDAA that would restrict Hegseth's travel expenses until the department releases certain operational information.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: How a U.S. author found — and helped build — community in a Japanese hot spring town
top_signals.summary: With a new home base, Hanna Kirshner hopes to build even deeper community and cultural connections in rural Ishikawa Prefecture.
